title: ebnerella schelhasii
intro: Ebnerella schelhasii, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy, is a plant species native to Mexico and other parts of North America, characterized by its delicate white flowers and thorny stems. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ebnerella schelhasii include reducing pain and inflammation, treating digestive issues, and promoting relaxation. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
